citations.text: AI4K12 Initiative (2020-2022). Five Big Ideas in Artificial Intelligence, Grade Band Progression Charts. A joint project of AAAI and CSTA, funded by NSF award DRL-1846073.

statement.en: Domain knowledge for vision includes knowing what kinds of objects are likely to appear in a scene, where they are likely to appear in relation to other objects, and how occlusions and shadows can alter object appearances.
